description: Read Project Gutenberg books via MCP. Search, fetch metadata, and retrieve text in passages.
name: io.github.bobbyhouse/project-gutenberg-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Base URL of your Gutenberg mirror. Run the mirror from the mirror/ directory and point this at it. See the README for setup instructions.
environmentVariables.name: GUTENBERG_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated list of tools to expose. Available: search_books, get_book_metadata, fetch_book_text, list_passages, get_passage
environmentVariables.name: GUTENBERG_TOOLS

environmentVariables.description: Project Gutenberg book ID to use as the default for all tools. Find IDs via search_books. Example: 2680 for Meditations by Marcus Aurelius.
environmentVariables.name: GUTENBERG_BOOK_ID

environmentVariables.description: Size in bytes of each passage returned by get_passage.
environmentVariables.name: GUTENBERG_CHUNK_SIZE

title: Project Gutenberg MCP
